name: Aut Gang
description:
Roblox A Universal Time Gang

The usual trio now here for you to experience what we like to call

A normal game

Drako (me) is the owner of the vip server that most of the swearing and funny stuff happens

Notive and blue, are both my friends and our aut gang is.. well... Bigger than just three people

Have fun

And dont worry

My bot will swear a lot

But will still be respectful!
creator: ItsDragonart
